contents: (** Throughout this section, we assume that we have a type [A] with decidable equality. This will be our indexing type and can be thought of as [nat] for reading purposes. *)
(** The Kronecker delta function is a function of elements of [A] that is 1 when the two numbers are equal and 0 otherwise. It is useful for working with finite sums of ring elements. *)

Definition kronecker_delta@{} (i j : A) : R
    := if dec (i = j) then 1 else 0.
(** Kronecker delta with the same index is 1. *)

Definition kronecker_delta_refl@{} (i : A)
    : kronecker_delta i i = 1.

goals.conclusion: kronecker_delta i i = 1
kronecker_delta i i = 1
(if dec (i = i) then 1 else 0) = 1
forall s : (i = i) + (i <> i), (if s then 1 else 0) = 1

contents: (** Kronecker delta with differing indices is 0. *)

Definition kronecker_delta_neq@{} {i j : A} (p : i <> j)
    : kronecker_delta i j = 0.

goals.conclusion: kronecker_delta i j = 0
kronecker_delta i j = 0
(if dec (i = j) then 1 else 0) = 0

contents: (** Kronecker delta is symmetric in its arguments. *)

Definition kronecker_delta_symm@{} (i j : A)
    : kronecker_delta i j = kronecker_delta j i.

goals.conclusion: kronecker_delta i j = kronecker_delta j i
kronecker_delta i j = kronecker_delta j i
(if dec (i = j) then 1 else 0) = (if dec (j = i) then 1 else 0)
1 = (if dec (j = i) then 1 else 0)
0 = (if dec (j = i) then 1 else 0)
1 = (if dec (j = i) then 1 else 0)
0 = (if dec (j = i) then 1 else 0)

contents: (** An injective endofunction on [A] preserves the Kronecker delta. *)

goals.conclusion: kronecker_delta (f i) (f j) = kronecker_delta i j
kronecker_delta (f i) (f j) = kronecker_delta i j
(if dec (f i = f j) then 1 else 0) = (if dec (i = j) then 1 else 0)
(if dec (f i = f j) then 1 else 0) = 1
(if dec (f i = f j) then 1 else 0) = 0
(if dec (f i = f j) then 1 else 0) = 1

contents: by decidable_true (dec (f i = f j)) (ap f p).

goals.conclusion: (if dec (f i = f j) then 1 else 0) = 0

contents: (** Kronecker delta commutes with any ring element. *)

Definition kronecker_delta_comm@{} (i j : A) (r : R)
    : r * kronecker_delta i j = kronecker_delta i j * r.

goals.conclusion: r * kronecker_delta i j = kronecker_delta i j * r
r * kronecker_delta i j = kronecker_delta i j * r
r * (if dec (i = j) then 1 else 0) = (if dec (i = j) then 1 else 0) * r

contents:
(** The following lemmas are specialised to when the indexing type is [nat]. *)

(** Kronecker delta where the first index is strictly less than the second is 0. *)

Definition kronecker_delta_lt {R : Ring} {i j : nat} (p : (i < j)%nat)
  : kronecker_delta (R:=R) i j = 0.

goals.conclusion: kronecker_delta i j = 0
kronecker_delta i j = 0
i <> j
Empty

contents: (** Kronecker delta where the first index is strictly greater than the second is 0. *)

Definition kronecker_delta_gt {R : Ring} {i j : nat} (p : (j < i)%nat)
  : kronecker_delta (R:=R) i j = 0.

goals.conclusion: kronecker_delta i j = 0
kronecker_delta i j = 0
i <> j
Empty

contents: (** Kronecker delta can be used to extract a single term from a finite sum. *)

Definition rng_sum_kronecker_delta_l {R : Ring} (n i : nat) (Hi : (i < n)%nat)
  (f : forall k, (k < n)%nat -> R)
  : ab_sum n (fun j Hj => kronecker_delta i j * f j Hj) = f i Hi.

goals.conclusion:
ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i j * f j Hj) =
f i Hi

ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i j * f j Hj) =
f i Hi

contents: revert i Hi f; simple_induction n n IHn; intros i Hi f.

goals.conclusion:
ab_sum 0 (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < 0)%nat) => kronecker_delta i j * f j Hj) =
f i Hi

ab_sum n.+1
  (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n.+1)%nat) => kronecker_delta i j * f j Hj) =
f i Hi

hypotheses.type:
forall (i0 : nat) (Hi0 : (i0 < n)%nat)
(f0 : forall k : nat, (k < n)%nat -> R),
ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i0 j * f0 j Hj) =
f0 i0 Hi0

goals.conclusion:
ab_sum n.+1
  (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n.+1)%nat) => kronecker_delta i j * f j Hj) =
f i Hi

f0 i0 Hi0

ab_sum n.+1

f i Hi

forall (i0 : nat) (Hi0 : (i0 < n)%nat)
(f0 : forall k : nat, (k < n)%nat -> R),
ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i0 j * f0 j Hj) =
f0 i0 Hi0

goals.conclusion:
sg_op (kronecker_delta i i * f i (leq_refl i.+1))
  (ab_sum i
     (fun (k : nat) (Hk : (k < i)%nat) =>
      kronecker_delta i k * f k (leq_succ_r Hk))) =
f i Hi

hypotheses.type:
forall (i0 : nat) (Hi0 : (i0 < i)%nat)
(f0 : forall k : nat, (k < i)%nat -> R),
ab_sum i (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < i)%nat) => kronecker_delta i0 j * f0 j Hj) =
f0 i0 Hi0

goals.conclusion:
sg_op (1 * f i (leq_refl i.+1))
  (ab_sum i
     (fun (k : nat) (Hk : (k < i)%nat) =>
      kronecker_delta i k * f k (leq_succ_r Hk))) =
f i Hi

hypotheses.type:
forall (i0 : nat) (Hi0 : (i0 < i)%nat)
(f0 : forall k : nat, (k < i)%nat -> R),
ab_sum i (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < i)%nat) => kronecker_delta i0 j * f0 j Hj) =
f0 i0 Hi0

goals.conclusion:
sg_op (f i (leq_refl i.+1))
  (ab_sum i
     (fun (k : nat) (Hk : (k < i)%nat) =>
      kronecker_delta i k * f k (leq_succ_r Hk))) =
f i Hi

hypotheses.type:
forall (i0 : nat) (Hi0 : (i0 < i)%nat)
(f0 : forall k : nat, (k < i)%nat -> R),
ab_sum i (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < i)%nat) => kronecker_delta i0 j * f0 j Hj) =

sg_op (f i (leq_refl i.+1))
  (ab_sum i
     (fun (k : nat) (Hk : (k < i)%nat) =>
      kronecker_delta i k * f k (leq_succ_r Hk))) =
f i Hi + 0

hypotheses.type:
forall (i0 : nat) (Hi0 : (i0 < i)%nat)
(f0 : forall k : nat, (k < i)%nat -> R),

goals.conclusion: sg_op (f i (leq_refl i.+1)) = plus (f i Hi)

contents: apply (ap (fun h => plus (f i h))), path_ishprop.

ab_sum i
  (fun (k : nat) (Hk : (k < i)%nat) =>
   kronecker_delta i k * f k (leq_succ_r Hk)) =
0

forall (k : nat) (Hk : (k < i)%nat),
kronecker_delta i k * f k (leq_succ_r Hk) = mon_unit

goals.conclusion:
sg_op (kronecker_delta i n * f n (leq_refl n.+1))
  (f i
     (leq_succ_r
        (let H := fst neq_iff_lt_or_gt in
         let p0 := H p in
         match p0 with
         | inl l => idmap l
         | inr g =>
             (fun g0 : (i > n)%nat =>
              let H0 := snd gt_iff_not_leq in
              let Hi0 := H0 Hi in Overture.Empty_rec (i < n)%nat (Hi0 g0)) g
         end))) =
f i Hi

hypotheses.type:
forall (i0 : nat) (Hi0 : (i0 < n)%nat)
(f0 : forall k : nat, (k < n)%nat -> R),
ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i0 j * f0 j Hj) =
f0 i0 Hi0

goals.conclusion:
sg_op (0 * f n (leq_refl n.+1))
  (f i
     (leq_succ_r
        (let H := fst neq_iff_lt_or_gt in
         let p0 := H p in
         match p0 with
         | inl l => l
         | inr g =>
             let H0 := snd gt_iff_not_leq in
             let Hi0 := H0 Hi in Overture.Empty_rec (i < n)%nat (Hi0 g)
         end))) =
f i Hi

hypotheses.type:
forall (i0 : nat) (Hi0 : (i0 < n)%nat)
(f0 : forall k : nat, (k < n)%nat -> R),
ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i0 j * f0 j Hj) =
f0 i0 Hi0

goals.conclusion:
sg_op 0
  (f i
     (leq_succ_r
        (let H := fst neq_iff_lt_or_gt in
         let p0 := H p in
         match p0 with
         | inl l => l
         | inr g =>
             let H0 := snd gt_iff_not_leq in
             let Hi0 := H0 Hi in Overture.Empty_rec (i < n)%nat (Hi0 g)
         end))) =
f i Hi

hypotheses.type:
forall (i0 : nat) (Hi0 : (i0 < n)%nat)
(f0 : forall k : nat, (k < n)%nat -> R),
ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i0 j * f0 j Hj) =
f0 i0 Hi0

goals.conclusion:
f i
  (leq_succ_r
     (let H := fst neq_iff_lt_or_gt in
      let p0 := H p in
      match p0 with
      | inl l => l
      | inr g =>
          let H0 := snd gt_iff_not_leq in
          let Hi0 := H0 Hi in Overture.Empty_rec (i < n)%nat (Hi0 g)
      end)) =
f i Hi

hypotheses.type:
forall (i0 : nat) (Hi0 : (i0 < n)%nat)
(f0 : forall k : nat, (k < n)%nat -> R),
ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i0 j * f0 j Hj) =
f0 i0 Hi0

contents: (** Variant of [rng_sum_kronecker_delta_l] where the indexing is swapped. *)

Definition rng_sum_kronecker_delta_l' {R : Ring} (n i : nat) (Hi : (i < n)%nat)
  (f : forall k, (k < n)%nat -> R)
  : ab_sum n (fun j Hj => kronecker_delta j i * f j Hj) = f i Hi.

goals.conclusion:
ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta j i * f j Hj) =
f i Hi

ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta j i * f j Hj) =
f i Hi

forall (k : nat) (Hk : (k < n)%nat),
kronecker_delta k i * f k Hk = ?Goal k Hk
ab_sum n ?Goal = f i Hi

forall (k : nat) (Hk : (k < n)%nat),
kronecker_delta k i * f k Hk =
(fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i j * f j Hj) k Hk

kronecker_delta k i * f k Hk =
(fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i j * f j Hj) k Hk

contents: (** Variant of [rng_sum_kronecker_delta_l] where the Kronecker delta appears on the right. *)

Definition rng_sum_kronecker_delta_r {R : Ring} (n i : nat) (Hi : (i < n)%nat)
  (f : forall k, (k < n)%nat -> R)
  : ab_sum n (fun j Hj => f j Hj * kronecker_delta i j) = f i Hi.

goals.conclusion:
ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => f j Hj * kronecker_delta i j) =
f i Hi

ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => f j Hj * kronecker_delta i j) =
f i Hi

forall (k : nat) (Hk : (k < n)%nat),
f k Hk * kronecker_delta i k = ?Goal k Hk
ab_sum n ?Goal = f i Hi

forall (k : nat) (Hk : (k < n)%nat),
f k Hk * kronecker_delta i k =
(fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i j * f j Hj) k Hk

f k Hk * kronecker_delta i k =
(fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta i j * f j Hj) k Hk

contents: (** Variant of [rng_sum_kronecker_delta_r] where the indexing is swapped. *)

Definition rng_sum_kronecker_delta_r' {R : Ring} (n i : nat) (Hi : (i < n)%nat)
  (f : forall k, (k < n)%nat -> R)
  : ab_sum n (fun j Hj => f j Hj * kronecker_delta j i) = f i Hi.

goals.conclusion:
ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => f j Hj * kronecker_delta j i) =
f i Hi

ab_sum n (fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => f j Hj * kronecker_delta j i) =
f i Hi

forall (k : nat) (Hk : (k < n)%nat),
f k Hk * kronecker_delta k i = ?Goal k Hk
ab_sum n ?Goal = f i Hi

forall (k : nat) (Hk : (k < n)%nat),
f k Hk * kronecker_delta k i =
(fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta j i * f j Hj) k Hk

f k Hk * kronecker_delta k i =
(fun (j : nat) (Hj : (j < n)%nat) => kronecker_delta j i * f j Hj) k Hk
